mapper.select:
select t1.id , t1.manifest_one_and , t1.attribute_12 , t1.manifest_posen , t1.attribute_11 , t1.manifest_issue , t1.attribute_10 , t1.last_update_date , t1.manifest_date_end , t1.created_dept , t1.last_update_ip , t1.manifest_leadership , t1.created_by , t1.attribute_04 , t1.last_updated_by , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_01 , t1.manifest_measure , t1.creation_date , t1.manifest_cause , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.attribute_06 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.list_mainly , t1.manifest_issue_cont , t1.version , t1.org_identity , t1.manifest_qian from dyn_task_checklist t1
t1.attribute_01 !='3'
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.MANIFEST_ONE_AND like concat(concat('%',#{bean.manifestOneAnd}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_12 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute12}),'%')
and t1.MANIFEST_POSEN like concat(concat('%',#{bean.manifestPosen}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_11 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute11}),'%')
and t1.MANIFEST_ISSUE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.manifestIssue}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_10 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute10}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.MANIFEST_DATE_END >= #{bean.manifestDateEndBegin}
and t1.MANIFEST_DATE_END <= #{bean.manifestDateEndEnd}
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.MANIFEST_LEADERSHIP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.manifestLeadership}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_04 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute04}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_03 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute03}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_02 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute02}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_01 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute01}),'%')
and t1.MANIFEST_MEASURE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.manifestMeasure}),'%')
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.MANIFEST_CAUSE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.manifestCause}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_09 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute09}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_08 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute08}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_07 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute07}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_06 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute06}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_05 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute05}),'%')
and t1.LIST_MAINLY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.listMainly}),'%')
and t1.MANIFEST_ISSUE_CONT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.manifestIssueCont}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and t1.MANIFEST_QIAN like concat(concat('%',#{bean.manifestQian}),'%')
and ${sfnConditions.sql}
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY =#{org}
order by t1.creation_date desc

select t1.id , t1.manifest_one_and , t1.attribute_12 , t1.manifest_posen , t1.attribute_11 , t1.manifest_issue , t1.attribute_10 , t1.last_update_date , t1.manifest_date_end , t1.created_dept , t1.last_update_ip , t1.manifest_leadership , t1.created_by , t1.attribute_04 , t1.last_updated_by , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_01 , t1.manifest_measure , t1.creation_date , t1.manifest_cause , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.attribute_06 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.list_mainly , t1.manifest_issue_cont , t1.version , t1.org_identity , t1.manifest_qian from dyn_task_checklist t1 where t1.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into dyn_task_checklist
id,
manifest_one_and,
attribute_12,
manifest_posen,
attribute_11,
manifest_issue,
attribute_10,
last_update_date,
manifest_date_end,
created_dept,
last_update_ip,
manifest_leadership,
created_by,
attribute_04,
last_updated_by,
attribute_03,
attribute_02,
attribute_01,
manifest_measure,
creation_date,
manifest_cause,
attribute_09,
attribute_08,
attribute_07,
attribute_06,
attribute_05,
list_mainly,
manifest_issue_cont,
version,
org_identity,
manifest_qian,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manifestOneAnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute12,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manifestPosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute11,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manifestIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{manifestDateEnd,jdbcType=DATE},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manifestLeadership,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manifestMeasure,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{manifestCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{listMainly,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manifestIssueCont,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manifestQian,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

insert into dyn_task_checklist( id, manifest_one_and, attribute_12, manifest_posen, attribute_11, manifest_issue, attribute_10, last_update_date, manifest_date_end, created_dept, last_update_ip, manifest_leadership, created_by, attribute_04, last_updated_by, attribute_03, attribute_02, attribute_01, manifest_measure, creation_date, manifest_cause, attribute_09, attribute_08, attribute_07, attribute_06, attribute_05, list_mainly, manifest_issue_cont, version, org_identity, manifest_qian)
select #{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.manifestOneAnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute12,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.manifestPosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute11,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.manifestIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute10,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdateDate}, #{item.manifestDateEnd,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.manifestLeadership,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.manifestMeasure,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creationDate}, #{item.manifestCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute09,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute08,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute07,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.listMainly,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.manifestIssueCont,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.manifestQian,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update dyn_task_checklist
id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manifest_one_and =#{manifestOneAnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_12 =#{attribute12,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manifest_posen =#{manifestPosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_11 =#{attribute11,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manifest_issue =#{manifestIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate},
manifest_date_end =#{manifestDateEnd,jdbcType=DATE},
created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manifest_leadership =#{manifestLeadership,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manifest_measure =#{manifestMeasure,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creation_date =#{creationDate},
manifest_cause =#{manifestCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
list_mainly =#{listMainly,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manifest_issue_cont =#{manifestIssueCont,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version =version+1,
org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manifest_qian =#{manifestQian,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
date_manifest = to_date(#{dateManifest},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update dyn_task_checklist set id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_one_and =#{manifestOneAnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_12 =#{attribute12,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_posen =#{manifestPosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_11 =#{attribute11,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_issue =#{manifestIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate}, manifest_date_end =#{manifestDateEnd,jdbcType=DATE}, created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_leadership =#{manifestLeadership,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_measure =#{manifestMeasure,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{creationDate}, manifest_cause =#{manifestCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, list_mainly =#{listMainly,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_issue_cont =#{manifestIssueCont,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_qian =#{manifestQian,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update.foreach: update dyn_task_checklist set id =#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_one_and =#{item.manifestOneAnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_12 =#{item.attribute12,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_posen =#{item.manifestPosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_11 =#{item.attribute11,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_issue =#{item.manifestIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_10 =#{item.attribute10,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{item.lastUpdateDate}, manifest_date_end =#{item.manifestDateEnd,jdbcType=DATE}, created_dept =#{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_ip =#{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_leadership =#{item.manifestLeadership,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_updated_by =#{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_measure =#{item.manifestMeasure,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{item.creationDate}, manifest_cause =#{item.manifestCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_09 =#{item.attribute09,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_08 =#{item.attribute08,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_07 =#{item.attribute07,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_06 =#{item.attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, list_mainly =#{item.listMainly,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_issue_cont =#{item.manifestIssueCont,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, org_identity =#{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifest_qian =#{item.manifestQian,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version =#{item.version};

mapper.update:
update dyn_inspection
id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_opinion =#{inspectionOpinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_11 =#{attribute11,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_material =#{inspectionMaterial,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate},
inspection_one_and =#{inspectionOneAnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_opinion_s =#{inspectionOpinionS,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_opinion_end =#{inspectionOpinionEnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_on =#{inspectionOn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_from_posen_tel =#{inspectionFromPosenTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_opinion_end_date =#{inspectionOpinionEndDate,jdbcType=DATE},
attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_posen =#{inspectionPosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_opinion_date =#{inspectionOpinionDate,jdbcType=DATE},
inspection_end_issue_qk =#{inspectionEndIssueQk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creation_date =#{creationDate},
inspection_from_posen_dept =#{inspectionFromPosenDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_from_date =#{inspectionFromDate,jdbcType=DATE},
attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_measure_issue =#{inspectionMeasureIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_opinion_date_s =#{inspectionOpinionDateS,jdbcType=DATE},
inspection_from_on =#{inspectionFromOn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version =version+1,
inspection_from_posen =#{inspectionFromPosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_end_issue =#{inspectionEndIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inspection_issue =#{inspectionIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version =#{version}
mapper.select: select t1.id , t1.inspection_opinion , t1.attribute_11 , t1.attribute_10 , t1.inspection_material , t1.last_update_date , t1.inspection_one_and , t1.inspection_opinion_s , t1.inspection_opinion_end , t1.inspection_on , t1.created_dept , t1.inspection_from_posen_tel , t1.last_update_ip , t1.created_by , t1.attribute_04 , t1.last_updated_by , t1.inspection_opinion_end_date , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.inspection_posen , t1.attribute_01 , t1.inspection_opinion_date , t1.inspection_end_issue_qk , t1.creation_date , t1.inspection_from_posen_dept , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.inspection_from_date , t1.attribute_06 , t1.inspection_measure_issue , t1.attribute_05 , t1.inspection_opinion_date_s , t1.inspection_from_on , t1.version , t1.inspection_from_posen , t1.inspection_end_issue , t1.org_identity , t1.inspection_issue from dyn_inspection t1 where t1.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_message
id,
title,
content,
url_address,
send_user,
send_date,
recv_user,
recv_date,
is_readed,
last_update_date,
last_updated_by,
creation_date,
created_by,
last_update_ip,
version,
attribute_01,
attribute_02,
attribute_03,
attribute_04,
attribute_05,
attribute_06,
attribute_07,
attribute_08,
attribute_09,
attribute_10,
url_type,
auto_disappear,
disappear_date,
send_deptid,
sys_application_id,
msg_id,
msg_mobile_url,
org_identity,
source_code,
source_name,
send_type,
msg_type,
recv_or_send,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{urlAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sendUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sendDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{recvUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{recvDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{isReaded,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{urlType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{autoDisappear,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{disappearDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{sendDeptid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sysApplicationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{msgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{msgMobileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sourceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sourceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sendType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{msgType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{recvOrSend,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.select: SELECT ACTIVITYNAME_ FROM "BPM_EXECUTION" where DBID_ = #{lcid} and ACTIVITYNAME_ = 'task2'
mapper.insert:
insert into dyn_inspec_ic
id,
inspection_opinion,
attribute_11,
attribute_10,
inspection_material,
last_update_date,
inspection_one_and,
inspection_opinion_s,
inspection_opinion_end,
inspection_on,
created_dept,
inspection_from_posen_tel,
last_update_ip,
created_by,
attribute_04,
last_updated_by,
inspection_opinion_end_date,
attribute_03,
attribute_02,
inspection_posen,
attribute_01,
inspection_opinion_date,
inspection_end_issue_qk,
creation_date,
inspection_from_posen_dept,
attribute_09,
attribute_08,
attribute_07,
inspection_from_date,
attribute_06,
inspection_measure_issue,
attribute_05,
inspection_opinion_date_s,
inspection_from_on,
version,
inspection_from_posen,
inspection_end_issue,
org_identity,
inspection_issue,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute11,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionMaterial,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{inspectionOneAnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinionS,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinionEnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionFromPosenTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinionEndDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionPosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinionDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{inspectionEndIssueQk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{inspectionFromPosenDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionFromDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionMeasureIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinionDateS,jdbcType=DATE},
#{inspectionFromOn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{inspectionFromPosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionEndIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inspectionIssue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.select: select count(*) from dyn_inspec_ic where attribute_11 = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_INSPECTION
INSPECTION_OPINION,
ATTRIBUTE_11,
ATTRIBUTE_10,
INSPECTION_MATERIAL,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
INSPECTION_ONE_AND,
INSPECTION_OPINION_S,
INSPECTION_OPINION_END,
INSPECTION_ON,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
INSPECTION_FROM_POSEN_TEL,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
CREATED_BY,
ATTRIBUTE_04,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
INSPECTION_OPINION_END_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE_03,
ATTRIBUTE_02,
INSPECTION_POSEN,
ATTRIBUTE_01,
INSPECTION_OPINION_DATE,
INSPECTION_END_ISSUE_QK,
CREATION_DATE,
INSPECTION_FROM_POSEN_DEPT,
ATTRIBUTE_09,
ATTRIBUTE_08,
ATTRIBUTE_07,
INSPECTION_FROM_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE_06,
INSPECTION_MEASURE_ISSUE,
ATTRIBUTE_05,
INSPECTION_OPINION_DATE_S,
INSPECTION_FROM_ON,
VERSION,
INSPECTION_FROM_POSEN,
INSPECTION_END_ISSUE,
ORG_IDENTITY,
INSPECTION_ISSUE,
#{inspectionOpinion,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute11,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionMaterial,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{inspectionOneAnd,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinionS,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinionEnd,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionFromPosenTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinionEndDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionPosen,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinionDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{inspectionEndIssueQk,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{inspectionFromPosenDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionFromDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionMeasureIssue,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionOpinionDateS,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{inspectionFromOn,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{inspectionFromPosen,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionEndIssue,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inspectionIssue,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
mapper.select: SELECT t3.BUSINESSSTATE_ FROM DYN_TASK_CHECKLIST t1 left join DYN_INSPECTION t2 on t1.id = t2.ATTRIBUTE_03 LEFT JOIN BPM_HIST_PROCINST t3 ON t2.ID = t3.FORMID_ where t1.id =#{id}
SELECT t2.DBID_ FROM DYN_INSPECTION t1 left join BPM_HIST_PROCINST t2 ON t1.ID = t2.FORMID_ where t1.ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{id}
select t3.ID_ as dbid from dyn_task_checklist t2 left join dyn_inspection t1 ON t2.id = t1.attribute_03 left join BPM_HIST_PROCINST t3 ON t1.id = t3.FORMID_ where t2.id=#{id}
